hybrid.failure_summary: The hybrid run reached the 30-turn cap after many mutations. The final scored output still retained `### Launch Event Planning` under `## Marketing` instead of moving it under `## Events` after `### Conference Planning`.

unix.failure_summary: The unix run reached the 30-turn cap with repeated invalid responses. The final scored output still retained `### Launch Event Planning` under `## Marketing` instead of moving it under `## Events` after `### Conference Planning`.

gap.rejection_reason: Mdtools passed the seed, but hybrid and unix both failed under both scorers, so the candidate produced no positive hybrid-minus-unix pass-rate gap and is not eligible for promotion.

notes: This marketing-operations subsection relocation was realistic and mdtools-solvable, but it did not improve the T10 headline metric because hybrid failed.
The trace adds rejected-candidate evidence only; no fixed-anchor or current-corpus HEADLINE row is warranted because no corpus member was promoted and no gap moved.
